channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-02-24 01:24 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: You need two pieces of ID to do a $19/hr job for Mamdani but no ID to vote for him. Let that sink in...
item.description: You need two pieces of ID to do a $19/hr job for Mamdani but no ID to vote for him. Let that sink in.

item.title: @elonmusk: A Restore Britain Government would hold a referendum on the death penalty. If the British people sup...
item.description: A Restore Britain Government would hold a referendum on the death penalty. If the British people support it, we would reintroduce the death penalty for cases of such brutal evil and undeniable guilt. Restore Britain would put the very worst rape gang savages to death.

item.title: @elonmusk: People giving OpenClaw root access to their entire life
item.description: People giving OpenClaw root access to their entire life

item.title: @elonmusk: “If you try to buy a gun, they’ll ID you six ways to Sunday.”@elonmuskon voter ID and fraud: “CA jus...
item.description: “If you try to buy a gun, they’ll ID you six ways to Sunday.”@elonmuskon voter ID and fraud: “CA just passed a law making it illegal to require voter ID in any election.” “They’re not even allowed to look at your ID.” “They’re proud of it— they’re not hiding it.” “It’s so fraud can never be proven. It enables large-scale fraud, and no way to prove it. How would you? It’s literally impossible— no ID. You’re not even allowed to show ID.” “They come up with some nice sounding this. Their rebuttal is, it’s racist to require ID. I think it’s racist and patronizing to say people can’t figure out how to get an ID.” “You need ID for everything. Except voting. It’s total bullshit, obviously Via@TuckerCarlson

item.title: @elonmusk: Anthropic is guilty of stealing training data at massive scale and has had to pay multi-billion doll...
item.description: Anthropic is guilty of stealing training data at massive scale and has had to pay multi-billion dollar settlements for their theft. This is just a fact.

item.title: @elonmusk: Most people have no idea that democracy would already be dead in America if not for the brave action...
item.description: Most people have no idea that democracy would already be dead in America if not for the brave actions of Senators Sinema and Manchin

item.title: @elonmusk: “There’s no fraud” they said. Yeah, right.
item.description: “There’s no fraud” they said. Yeah, right.

item.title: @elonmusk: They filmed child rape by a dog, to use as blackmail, with police participation? Fucking hell.
item.description: They filmed child rape by a dog, to use as blackmail, with police participation? Fucking hell.

item.title: @elonmusk: “No your honor, you don’t understand. My client didn’t just make a bad decision. He’s constitutional...
item.description: “No your honor, you don’t understand. My client didn’t just make a bad decision. He’s constitutionally incapable of not committing horrific crimes. He’ll never understand why he shouldn’t murder. And he’ll definitely never contribute to society” “…”

item.title: @elonmusk: It is strange that the first police officer on the scene of the 2017 London Bridge terror attack can...
item.description: It is strange that the first police officer on the scene of the 2017 London Bridge terror attack can be sacked for using the word ‘pikey’ in a WhatsApp message, while those in the police and social services who facilitated or colluded in rape gangs have not been held to account.

item.title: @elonmusk: .@Grokis coming to Teslas in Australia and New Zealand It can answer almost any question using real-...
item.description: .@Grokis coming to Teslas in Australia and New Zealand It can answer almost any question using real-time information & also add/edit navigation destinations to become your personal guide Phased roll out has now begun to eligible vehicles

item.title: @elonmusk: Connect to reliable high-speed internet in minutes 🛰️❤️
item.description: Connect to reliable high-speed internet in minutes 🛰️❤️

item.title: @elonmusk: when the people who are supposed to guard against evil participate in it, they should face especiall...
item.description: when the people who are supposed to guard against evil participate in it, they should face especially harsh consequences.xcancel.com/ArthurMacwaters/status…

item.title: @elonmusk: xAI now have MCP server for API Docs
item.description: xAI now have MCP server for API Docs

item.title: @elonmusk: From this goal of Grok, all things flow: Rigorous truth-seeking Appreciation of beauty Fostering hum...
item.description: From this goal of Grok, all things flow: Rigorous truth-seeking Appreciation of beauty Fostering humanity Discovering all physics Inventing all useful technologies Consciousness to the stars Love
